narratives.Overview: Expose a clean programmatic API from packages/core so marky can be used as a library in build tools, editors, and other Node.js programs — not just as a CLI. The API accepts file paths or string content plus a MarkyConfig and returns LintResult objects. Covers FR-8.

items.title: marky.lint(files: string[], config?: MarkyConfig): Promise<LintResult[]> exported from packages/core
marky.lintString(content: string, config?: MarkyConfig, filename?: string): Promise<LintResult> exported from packages/core
All public types (MarkyConfig, LintResult, LintViolation, Plugin) exported from packages/core index
API documented with JSDoc comments on all exported functions and types
Example usage snippet in packages/core/README.md showing lint() and lintString() calls
Unit tests cover: lint() on multiple files returns one LintResult per file, lintString() with no config returns results using defaults
task check passes at >= 85% coverage for API surface
